title: Excalibur | FTB Quests/Teams Support
body:
This project changes the textures of the FTB series mods into the Excalibur style.



Best Used with Excalibur

And Requires FTB:
Teams 
Quests
Library






Credits:

The creators of Excalibur and FTB.
oni7suKa for the hour glass and globe icons from his supplementaries pack.
